_doc: Plugin-only: the AGT governance plugin ON with the shipped DEFAULT policy (enforce mode), native permission left permissive so the plugin is the sole governance layer. policy_path points at the repo's config/default-policy.json (the exact regex set the bypass cases target). NOTE: because OpenCode never fires the permission.ask plugin hook (opencode#7006) and bash sits at reviewTools, the plugin hard-denies every bash not separately allow-listed (deny_kind=fail-closed-review) — this is the shipped behaviour under test, not a config choice.
